items.title: From AI to interceptors, Ukraine is trying to drone-proof its skies
items.dek: After four years of Russia's full-scale invasion, Ukraine has become far more successful at fighting off air raids.
items.body: After four years of Russia's full-scale invasion, Ukraine has become far more successful at fighting off air raids.

items.title: Samsung strike on hold as workers push for AI bonus
items.dek: The walkout, which was due to start on Thursday, has been suspended while union members vote on a tentative deal.
items.body: The walkout, which was due to start on Thursday, has been suspended while union members vote on a tentative deal.
